title: Remaining Questions I Have From NGE
display_title: Remaining Questions I Have From NGE
wikitext:
[]: Remaining Questions I Have From NGE             Quote Post by Rightstated » Thu Feb 23, 2012 12:17 pm Hi everybody. I was wondering if anyone could possibly give me further insight, possibilities, or even answers to some of my remaining questions on NGE. I have watched the original 26 episode, Death & Rebirth, and The End of Evangelion twice over, and I have read through what is completed of the manga twice over as well. After my second time around with the series, I composed a list of remaining questions that I was a little fuzzy on still. I composed the questions in chronological order to how they happened in the series to the best of my ability, and some questions link up or could be answered with answers to some of the other questions. If anybody could help me this it would be greatly appreciated. If you were to answer any set of questions from this post, I'm having a hard time with Question 11, so any attempt in answering it would be wonderful. For brevity’s sake I’ll try not to explain what I think about the questions too much in the questions that I don’t care as much about, because of the long list of questions I have. I actually might have an answer to some of the questions already, but still have some level of doubt. I have also looked at many other posts on various forums, including this one, and have reviewed the evageeks wiki site, so any questions that I still have are because I'm not 100% satisfied with the answer given, or the answer that I have come up with by myself. Of course I haven't seen every piece of content on the internet, so any help would be great. Oh, and my apologies for the length of the questions and the post, I wanted to be as specific as possible, haha. Thanks everybody for any help you can give me, and take care. : ) Neon Genesis Evangelion (Original Series & EoE) Questions: 1.) [s]Is each planet created with an egg/moon, or does the egg have to land on the planet? For example, was the White Moon on earth to begin with, from earth’s creation, or did it actually make a landing on earth after it was created? If the White Moon did land on the planet earth, and was not there from the very beginning, then when did the White Moon land? Explain.[/s] ---> Kind of meaningless question, but if you want to respond, go ahead. 2.) Why didn’t the Angels populate the earth before the Lilim did even though the Black Moon containing Lilith landed on the earth after the Black Moon containing Adam did? Is it because the Angels take a really long time to populate the earth? Or was it because the White Moon and Adam were frozen in the Antarctic before they could populate? Explain. 3.) When the Black Moon hit the earth, why did the Lilim populate right away, as opposed to that of the Angels and the White Moon? How did the Black Moon’s landing cause the First Impact because the Angels hadn’t populated yet, and no contact between Adam and Lilith was noted? Was this because the First Impact was no more than the impact of the Black Moon with the earth, and not that of the process in which Instrumentality takes place? Explain. 4.) When the Black Moon’s Spear of Longinus was destroyed upon the Black Moon’s impact with the earth, did the White Moon’s Spear take action to put Adam into stasis because of the fact that Adam could not populate the world with angels, and that Lilith’s Spear was destroyed, so Lilith was the only one left who could populate the earth? What is the Spear of Longinus exactly, and how does it work? What is the Spear’s role in Instrumentality, and how does it affect and interact with Lilith and Adam? Explain. 5.) What happens leading up to the Second Impact? What was the purpose of the expedition? Did the humans insert the Spear into Adam to separate the body (embryo) and soul (Kaworu)? Was the Spear found in Adam to begin with? When the Spear was taken from the Antarctic the first time, before Second Impact, what was it used for? Was it to divide Lilith into the body and soul, or maybe was it used to start the Eva project? And when the Spear was taken back to the Antarctic, what was the purpose of sticking the Spear into Adam, and what was its relationship with the cause of the Second Impact? Since it wasn’t a complete Second Impact because the whole Human race was not completely destroyed, what prevented it from being so? Was it because of the Spear? Was the whole experiment/expedition leading up to the Second Impact to test the Super Solenoid Theory? Explain. 6.) Why did it take 15 years after the Second Impact for the first Angels (Besides that of Lilith and Adam) to start attacking? When were the Angels created? Explain. 7.) If the Angels are after the body of Adam in order to extinguish the Lilim from the earth so that they are the primary life forms, why attack Tokyo-3 before Adam’s embryo was delivered to Tokyo-3 and Nerv? What are the Angels trying to accomplish if that is not the case? What happens if an Angel comes into contact with Lilith? What happens if the Angels retrieve the body/embryo of Adam? Explain. 8.) Why did Gendo require the Spear of Longinus the second time? If it was to halt the growth of Lilith because she was becoming too powerful, then what would happen if they didn’t stick the Spear into her and let her continue to grow? What was this action’s relevance to the Instrumentality Project? Explain. 9.) Why was Eva Unit 01 created with Lilith when all of the other Evas were created from Adam? Was creating Eva Unit 01 in accordance with both of Seele’s and Gendo’s plans, or just Gendo? Explain. 10.) [s]Who is the soul in Eva Unit 00? Is it possibly Ritsuko Akagi’s mother, or is it Rei I? Explain.[/s] ---> I don't know why I asked this because I have already seen the article on the evageeks wiki. If you want to discuss further, then go ahead, but I don't find a reply necessary. 11.) What is needed in order for Instrumentality to take place, or one race (Either Adam, or Lilith) to become the dominate race and destroy the other? What is needed to cause this in relation to the body and soul of Adam and Lilith, and what do the bodies and souls of Adam Lilith do on their own and when they are put together in various combinations? What are the Angel’s plans, Seele’s plans, Gendo’s plans, and how did they differ from what actually happened? Why did Third Impact occur the way it did, and how? What is the Spear of Longinus’ significance in the Third Impact and Instrumentality? For example, what had to change in everyone’s plans when the Spear of Longinus was lost? What is Eva Unit 01’s significance in the Third Impact and Instrumentality, as well as what is the significance of the Mass Production Evas? This confuses me the most out of any set of questions. In the end it seems like Rei or the soul of Lilith, took Adam’s body/embryo from Gendo, and combined with the body of Lilith, and initiated Third Impact along with the 9 Mass Production Evas, Eva Unit 01, and the Spear of Longinus which somehow returned in the whole ordeal for some apparent reason. This all happened without Adam’s soul it seems because Kaworu was killed by Shinji and Eva Unit 01. Was Eva Unit 01 needed for instrumentality from the get go or was it just used as a substitute because Kaworu was killed and the Spear of Longinus was lost. It seemed that Seele got fed up with Gendo and decided to initiate Third Impact by sending Kaworu to link up with Lilith, but why did this happen, and how would this be the case? It seems that there are many possibilities for how Instrumentality could take place, or how one race could become the dominant over the other, but what are the exact details of what is needed for it to take place? Explain in depth. 12.) Why were 12 Mass Production Evas supposed to be built for Seele’s plan to work even though their plan succeeded with only 9? How did Seele succeed in creating Evas with S^2 engines when all other attempts, such as in the case of Eva Unit 04, failed? What is the S^2’s engines importance and significance in relation to the Impacts and Instrumentality, and why does it make Eva Unit 01 and the Mass Production Evas so important in relation to Instrumentality and the Third Impact? Explain. 13.) [s]What was the soul of the Mass Production Evas? Explain.[/s] ---> Question is insignificant, so you can disregard. 14.) What is the significance of the Tree of Life in relation with the Impacts and Instrumentality? Explain. 15.) [s]Was Shinji chosen to decide whether Instrumentality would take place, or was that up to each individual person? Were Shinji and Asuka the only ones left at the end of it all? Why did Shinji choke Asuka? Explain.[/s] ---> This one has been asked to death as well, so I'm content with my own answer. I don't find a response to be necessary, but if you feel like it, feel free to discuss. 16.) [s]Why did the Instrumentality Project have to wait for all of the Angels to be destroyed? Why didn’t Seele just let one of the first Angels make contact with Lilith for Instrumentality to take place? Explain.[/s] ---> I've heard various answers to this question, but I still don't feel completely content with the answers that I've heard. Feel free to discuss further, but if you choose to skip over, that is okay too.

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Thu Feb 23, 2012 12:41 pm "Explain." after every single question? What are you, stupid?

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Thu Feb 23, 2012 12:45 pm Well most of this has been discussed to death but I’ll answer what I can. but it has been explained much better in the past by others 7.) If the Angels are after the body of Adam in order to extinguish the Lilim from the earth so that they are the primary life forms, why attack Tokyo-3 before Adam’s embryo was delivered to Tokyo-3 and Nerv?

For example, was the White Moon on earth to begin with, from earth’s creation, or did it actually make a landing on earth after it was created? If the White Moon did land on the planet earth, and was not there from the very beginning, then when did the White Moon land? Explain. ---> Kind of meaningless question, but if you want to respond, go ahead.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Feb 23, 2012 3:41 pm Final Messenger wrote: No one knows the souls of the harpies, but the dummy plugs that operated them used Kaworu clones.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Feb 23, 2012 4:45 pm Reichu wrote: gigantic CD doodads.

[]:             Quote Post by Rightstated » Thu Feb 23, 2012 5:20 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Actual technical terminology.

[]:             Quote Post by Karex_Usyrion » Fri Feb 24, 2012 1:54 am 13.) What was the soul of the Mass Production Evas? Explain. ---> Question is insignificant, so you can disregard. Probably hobos.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Feb 24, 2012 6:42 am AuraTwilight wrote: The Spear's role is kind of weird. Apparently it was needed to create a 'Tree of Life' with Unit 01, which is mostly for SEELE's Religion Boner but is somehow also necessary. Apparently it somehow altered the way Instrumentality was functioning.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Feb 24, 2012 1:53 pm I'll be honest, Bagheera. I'll just be satisfied if Religion Boner becomes a turn of phrase on this forum.
